Home.title: Phuc Anh Dang
Home.bio: Curious and motivated, passionate about data management and strategic exploitation.
Home.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Technology (BUT) in Data Science, I am seeking an opportunity to apply my skills in a stimulating professional environment and learn alongside industry experts. My goal is to contribute to innovative data management projects and make a positive impact.
Home.quote: "Without data, you’re just another person with an opinion."

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.subtitle: A showcase of my data science and development work

dataWarehouse.title: Chinook Data Warehouse
dataWarehouse.description: Transformed the Chinook database into a star schema Data Warehouse to optimize music sales analysis. Designed and automated a full ETL pipeline with Oracle Data Integrator.

airQuality.title: Vietnam Air Quality Analysis
airQuality.description: Collected and prepared air quality data from 40+ stations via APIs. Cleaned, structured, and analyzed pollution levels using unsupervised clustering (PCA + K-means).

frenchCinema.title: French Cinema Analysis
frenchCinema.description: Analyzed the evolution of French cinemas facing Covid-19, streaming, and inflation (2018 base). Prepared data in Python, analyzed in R, and visualized in Power BI (2,042 establishments).

education.hs_school: Hanoi-Amsterdam High School for the Gifted

timeline.title: Design of a Data Warehouse
timeline.desc: Transformed the Chinook database into a star Data Warehouse to optimize music sales analysis. Designed and automated a full ETL pipeline with Oracle Data Integrator.

timeline.title: Air Quality Analysis in Vietnam
timeline.desc: Collected and prepared data from 40+ stations via APIs. Used unsupervised clustering (PCA + K-means) to classify stations and facilitate environmental analysis.

timeline.title: French Cinemas Analysis
timeline.desc: Analyzed the evolution of French cinemas facing Covid-19, streaming, and inflation. Data prep in Python, analysis in R, and dataviz in Power BI.
